actor-jb2a-animations.tab.title: Animations
actor-jb2a-animations.tab.description: Store named JB2A / Sequencer database paths on this actor and play them later from macros.
actor-jb2a-animations.columns.name: Name
actor-jb2a-animations.notifications.noDa: No JB2A entries were found in the Sequencer database.
actor-jb2a-animations.warnings.noSequenc: Sequencer is not active. The tab will save data, but playback macros will not work until Sequencer is enabled.
actor-jb2a-animations.warnings.noJB2A: No active JB2A module was detected. You can still type a Sequencer database path manually.
actor-jb2a-animations.help.title: Macro examples
actor-jb2a-animations.picker.title: Pick JB2A Animation
actor-jb2a-animations.picker.hint: Filter and pick a Sequencer database path beginning with jb2a.
